audit_items.proof_trace: `AcquireRandomInfoThreadSet()` explicitly returns NULL on allocation failure (random-private.h:66-67, 73), but `AddNoiseImage` performs no NULL check before dereferencing `random_info[0]` at line 326 (OpenMP path) and `random_info[id]` at line 377. The cleanup call at line 402 also invokes `assert(random_info != NULL)` inside `DestroyRandomInfoThreadSet`, compounding the failure.
audit_items.attack_scenario: An attacker submits a crafted or large image to an ImageMagick `-noise` operation; under memory pressure `AcquireRandomInfoThreadSet` returns NULL, which is immediately dereferenced at fx.c:326 or fx.c:377, causing a NULL pointer dereference crash (DoS).
